name: Qajar Iran (1789–1925)
description: A green–white–red horizontal tricolour charged in the centre with a gold Lion and Sun (Shir-o-Khorshid): a lion holding a sword before a rising sun.
history: Early-20th-century state flag of Qajar Iran. The green-white-red tricolour with central Lion and Sun was codified in the Supplementary Fundamental Laws of 7 October 1907 and detailed by decree on 4 September 1910.

features.role: lion of the Shir-o-Khorshid holding a sword
